form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 2nd of 10 at this track on March 4 over 1200m, on a wet track; 1.75 len behind Vivacious with 57kg at $2. form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Returns from a 30-day let-up. Last start favourite; ran on from midfield and won by a 0.4 len at Ashburton March 12 over 1400m defeating Maybe Diva with 56.5kg at $4.10. The start before that favourite; won by a 0.4 len at Ashburton February 20 over 1400m on a rain affected track defeating Nuncio carrying 57.5kg at $5. An inside stall is a big advantage. Going well and is one of the leading chances.
